questions.question: For matrix multiplication (m x n) @ (n x p), what must be true about the dimensions?
questions.question_zh: 矩阵乘法 (m x n) @ (n x p) 中，维度必须满足什么条件？
options: m must equal p
The inner dimensions n must match
All dimensions must be equal
m must be greater than p
options_zh: m 必须等于 p
中间的内层维度 n 必须相同
所有维度都必须相等
m 必须大于 p
questions.explanation: Matrix multiplication requires the number of columns in the first matrix (n) to equal the number of rows in the second matrix (n). The result has shape (m x p).
questions.explanation_zh: 矩阵乘法要求第一个矩阵的列数（n）等于第二个矩阵的行数（n），结果形状是 (m x p)。

questions.question: What is the identity matrix?
options: A matrix of all ones
A square matrix with ones on the diagonal and zeros elsewhere that acts as the multiplicative identity
A matrix where every element is unique
The transpose of any given matrix
options_zh: 全是 1 的矩阵
对角线为 1、其余元素为 0 的方阵，乘法的单位元
每个元素都唯一的矩阵
任意矩阵的转置
questions.explanation: The identity matrix I has ones on the diagonal and zeros everywhere else. Multiplying any matrix by I returns the original matrix unchanged, like multiplying a number by 1.
questions.explanation_zh: 单位矩阵 I 对角线为 1，其他位置都是 0。任何矩阵乘以 I 都保持不变，就像数字乘以 1 一样。

questions.question: What is the key difference between element-wise multiplication and matrix multiplication?
questions.question_zh: 逐元素乘法与矩阵乘法的关键区别是什么？
options: Element-wise is faster while matrix multiplication is more accurate
Element-wise multiplies matching positions (same shape required), matrix multiplication takes dot products of rows and columns (inner dimensions must match)
They produce the same result but use different notation
Element-wise only works on vectors while matrix multiplication works on matrices
options_zh: 逐元素更快，矩阵乘法更精确
逐元素是对应位置相乘（形状必须一致），矩阵乘法是行列之间做点积（内层维度必须匹配）
结果相同，只是写法不同
逐元素只适用于向量，矩阵乘法只适用于矩阵
questions.explanation: Element-wise (Hadamard) product multiplies corresponding elements and requires identical shapes. Matrix multiplication computes dot products between rows and columns with the rule (m,n)@(n,p)=(m,p).
questions.explanation_zh: 逐元素积（Hadamard 积）把对应位置的元素相乘，要求形状完全一致。矩阵乘法是行与列做点积，规则为 (m,n)@(n,p)=(m,p)。

questions.question: In the expression 'output = relu(W @ x + b)', what role does broadcasting play?
questions.question_zh: 在表达式 output = relu(W @ x + b) 中，broadcasting 起什么作用？
options: It broadcasts the computation across multiple GPUs
It automatically stretches the bias vector b to match the shape of W @ x so they can be added
It converts the data types of W and x to match
It repeats the relu activation across all elements
options_zh: 把计算「广播」到多张 GPU 上
自动把 bias 向量 b 扩展成与 W @ x 相同形状，从而可以相加
把 W 和 x 的数据类型对齐
把 relu 激活在所有元素上重复一遍
questions.explanation: W @ x produces a column vector, and b is also a vector. Broadcasting stretches b across the batch dimension if needed, allowing element-wise addition without explicit shape matching.
questions.explanation_zh: W @ x 得到一个列向量，b 也是向量。broadcasting 会在需要时把 b 沿 batch 维扩展开，从而可以直接相加，不必手动对齐形状。

questions.question: What does a determinant of zero for a matrix indicate?
questions.question_zh: 矩阵行列式为 0 意味着什么？
options: The matrix has all zero entries
The matrix is singular: it crushes at least one dimension, cannot be inverted, and has no unique solution
The matrix is the identity matrix
The matrix performs a rotation
options_zh: 矩阵全部元素都是 0
矩阵是奇异矩阵：至少压扁了一个维度，不可逆，对应的线性方程组没有唯一解
矩阵是单位矩阵
矩阵执行的是旋转
questions.explanation: A zero determinant means the transformation collapses space by at least one dimension (e.g., mapping 2D to a line). The matrix has no inverse, and linear systems using it have either no solution or infinitely many.
questions.explanation_zh: 行列式为 0 表示这种变换至少压扁了一个维度（比如把 2D 压成一条线）。矩阵不可逆，对应的线性方程组要么无解，要么有无穷多解。
